# Template Reference / 模板参考

- Updated: 2026-06-13
- Scope: documentation and report/template references for `nautilus_account_console`

## Entries

| Path | Purpose |
| --- | --- |
| [dslresearch-reference](dslresearch-reference/README.md) | Reference-only mirror of matching template files copied from `D:\Nautilus\DSLresearch`. |

## Rules

1. Templates under this directory are references unless a local ADR or implementation change explicitly promotes a trimmed account-console version.
2. Do not use these files as account, broker, admission, approval, capital or runtime truth sources.
3. When adapting a template, keep the smallest useful structure and rewrite owner/verdict/evidence wording for this repository.
